2605.28666.title: An LLM-Based Assistance System for Intuitive and Flexible Capability-Based Planning
2605.28666.paper_summary: In modern industry, dynamic environments and the complexity of modular and reconfigurable resources require automated planning of process sequences. Capability-based planning approaches address this by automatically generating plans from semantic knowledge models that describe resource functions in a machine-interpretable form. Their practical use, however, remains limited: solver feedback, especially in the case of unsatisfiability, is difficult to interpret, and the knowledge models require adaptation as operational conditions change or requests become infeasible. This paper presents a hybrid assistance system that augments an existing capability-based Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) planning approach with an Large Language Model (LLM)-based layer for natural-language interaction, explanation, and adaptation. Formal planning correctness remains with the symbolic planner, while the LLM layer handles natural-language access and flexible knowledge model adaptation under explicit Human-in-the-Loop (HitL) approval. The system decomposes into four components: Capability Grounding, Symbolic Planning, Result Interpretation, and Planning Adaptation, realized as a routed agentic workflow in which a central router delegates to five specialized agents. The system is evaluated on a modular production system across four scenario types. Of 23 test cases, 9 of 10 knowledge queries and all 4 satisfiable planning cases were handled correctly, 3 of 4 unsatisfiable cases produced concrete repair proposals, and all 5 adaptive planning scenarios resolved into satisfiable plans through iterative, user-approved knowledge model modifications. The findings confirm that combining formal planning with LLM-based assistance substantially improves accessibility and adaptability in industrial automation.
2605.28666.paper_summary_zh: 在現代工業中，動態環境以及模組化和可重構資源的複雜性要求自動化的過程序列規劃。基於能力的規劃方法通過自動生成計劃來解決這個問題，這些計劃來自於描述資源功能的語義知識模型，並以機器可解釋的形式呈現。然而，它們的實際使用仍然有限：解決器的反饋，特別是在不滿足的情況下，難以解釋，而知識模型需要隨著操作條件的變化或請求變得不可行而進行調整。本文提出了一個混合輔助系統，該系統增強了現有的基於能力的滿足性模組理論（SMT）規劃方法，並加入了一個基於大型語言模型（LLM）的層，用於自然語言互動、解釋和調整。形式規劃的正確性仍由符號規劃者維持，而LLM層則處理自然語言訪問和在明確的人類參與（HitL）批准下的靈活知識模型調整。該系統分解為四個組件：能力基礎、符號規劃、結果解釋和規劃調整，實現為一個路由的智能工作流程，其中中央路由器將任務委派給五個專門的代理。該系統在一個模組化生產系統上進行了四種場景類型的評估。在23個測試案例中，10個知識查詢中有9個和所有4個可滿足的規劃案例均正確處理，4個不滿足的案例中有3個產生了具體的修復提案，所有5個自適應規劃場景都通過迭代的、用戶批准的知識模型修改解決為可滿足的計劃。研究結果確認，將正式規劃與基於LLM的輔助結合，顯著提高了工業自動化中的可及性和適應性。
2605.28666.author: Luis Miguel Vieira da Silva et.al.
2605.28666.authors: Luis Miguel Vieira da Silva, Nicolas König, Felix Gehlhoff
